chunks.title: Introduction to Animal-Based Ice Cream
chunks.summary: The speaker introduces the concept of animal-based ice cream, claiming it's the healthiest option available. They emphasize the benefits for families and kids, contrasting it with traditionally unhealthy ice cream.
chunks.transcript: this is ice cream but it's not any ice cream this is animal-based ice cream and I believe this is the healthiest ice cream on the planet I made this ice cream using only the finest purely animal-based ingredients I'm going to show you how to make probably one of the best foods on the planet real animal based ice cream healthy for you healthy for your family your kids will love this you'll love this ice cream traditionally is a garbage food but this is incredibly

chunks.title: Benefits of Raw Cream and Dairy
chunks.summary: The discussion shifts to raw cream, detailing its high nutritional content and the immunological benefits found in raw dairy. The speaker compares raw milk to pasteurized milk, highlighting the loss of beneficial components during pasteurization and citing studies supporting the health benefits of raw dairy for children.
chunks.transcript: raw cream the cream is more of the milk fat so if you look at butter butter is about 85% milk fat the lipid components of milk and cream is going to be about 40% fat so cream is halfway to butter and we know that 60% of the immunologically Active Components in raw dairy are found in the butter fat so butter is a health food ice cream can be a health food especially when it's using a raw cream so this is rawam cream right here and the reason I'm such a fan of raw dairy versus pasteurized Dairy is both based on the science and what we know about how the heating of milk changes the bioactive components that can be helpful for humans so first and foremost we know that raw milk contains over 700 species of bacteria that are commensal that can help shape the human gut this is mamalian milk whether it's from a mother from a human's mother's breast from a camel from a horse from a cow from a buffalo all of these milks contain hundreds of different species of bacteria that humans have been co-evolving with for thousands of years that are benefit the whey protein and milk we know is beneficial for humans and we know that when you heat the milk you lose the benefits of the Whey Protein there are multiple studies in kids showing that kids who grow up drinking raw milk versus pasteurized milk have lower rates of asthma eczema hay fever and allergies and that's been repeated multiple times across multiple studies there's also evidence that kids who drink raw milk have lower rates of upper respiratory tract infection infections colds and viruses the literature on raw milk is astounding it's very deep I've talked about it in a previous podcast which we can link to in this video with Mark McAfee from raw Farm I actually went to Fresno to the biggest raw dairy farm in the world and got to see the incredible nature of raw milk how it's produced how it's kept clean at that farm but I'm a huge fan of

chunks.title: Nutritional Power of Egg Yolks
chunks.summary: The speaker explains the nutritional advantages of egg yolks over egg whites, citing their rich content in vitamins and nutrients. They advocate for including raw egg yolks in the ice cream mixture while emphasizing the importance of not consuming raw egg whites due to avidin content.
chunks.transcript: some raw egg yolks I don't do raw egg whites why because the egg white contains avidin which binds B6 you don't want to eat raw egg whites but egg yolks are fair game you guys know this but egg yolks are incredibly nutritious things like Coline vitamin K2 biotin folate riboflavin that is a nutritional Powerhouse I don't know why for the last few decades we've been throwing out the yolks we've wasted so much good nutrition in been eating the whites the whites have nutrition too but I prefer the whites when they're cooked if you want to eat them raw get some raw egg yolks and that's going to make a delicious compliment to the raw milk I mean those two alone an incredible

chunks.title: Natural Sweeteners vs. Processed Sugars
chunks.summary: The video discusses the use of natural sweeteners such as honey and fruit, contrasting them with unhealthy processed sugars like high fructose corn syrup. The speaker presents evidence supporting honey's health benefits, particularly for diabetics, and encourages viewers to choose unprocessed sugars.
chunks.transcript: flavors of ice cream for you guys so you can see the colors I'm going to use a local mango and some dragon fruit look at how beautiful that is that one's going to be nice and red and I have a local honey now I'm intentional when I think about the honey to sweeten this ice cream most ice cream on the shelves is sweetened with processed sugar or high fructose corn syrup now neither of those is great in my opinion high fructose corn syrup is horrible they're all all sorts of problems with this in the medical literature I'm not a huge fan of processed sugar because of all the things that get done to the sugar to process it but unprocessed sugars like those found in fruit or honey there's tons of evidence these are good for humans and we know that things like orange juice containing fruit sugar or cherry juice or grape juice these improve endothelial function these improve the function of Our arteries honey has actually been studied in diabetics and found to improve insulin sensitivity Yes you heard that right honey at doses of 125 gram per day in

chunks.title: Choosing Safe Ingredients
chunks.summary: The speaker emphasizes the importance of selecting quality ingredients, such as organic honey and microplastic-free sea salt. They discuss the dangers of microplastics found in sea salt and the potential health risks associated with consuming contaminated products.

chunks.title: Enhancing Ice Cream with Nutrient-Dense Additions
chunks.summary: Suggestions are given on supercharging the ice cream mixture with nutrient-dense ingredients like raw liver or organ supplements. The speaker discusses how these additions can enhance the nutrition of the final product without compromising taste.
chunks.transcript: supercharge the ice cream you could put some raw liver in there or raw heart I'm going to put some beef organs from hard and soil supplements in there that is freeze-dried heart liver kidney spleen and pancreas and you're not even going to be able to taste it so I got six capsules of beef organs six capsules of grass-fed colostrum or even more of these immunoactive peptides that come with the col the first milk from cows so this is what's going in the ice cream this is a nutrient Powerhouse and I can guarantee that if you make ice cream with this quality of ingredients you'll love it

chunks.title: Final Preparation and Presentation
chunks.summary: The ice cream is prepared in a Vitamix blender, with the speaker guiding viewers through the final steps of chilling and serving. They highlight the appealing colors and nutritional benefits of the animal-based ice cream, reiterating its health advantages.
chunks.transcript: [Applause] up all right so just so you guys know I'm using the clear Vitamix container to show you how it looks to make it look better for the video but I have a stainless steel Vitamix that I think is much better if you want to do this at home last step pour it into container put it in the freezer and chill for 6 hours ready to go time to pull it out of the freezer it's been in there for about 6 hours look at that it's ready so you guys can see super easy tastes like ice cream looks like ice cream is way healthier than mainstream ice cream you don't have to give up ice cream in your life just use things like raw butter raw cream raw milk organic fruit glyphosate free honey microplastic free sea salt you can make healthy nutritious ice cream for you and your family look at these colors that's so beautiful dragon fruit and mango flavored animal based ice cream there you have it if you guys like this content and you're finding value in this please like subscribe and share with people in your life that need to know how to make animal- based foods and get garbage ice cream out of their life get more nutritious animal- based foods into their life see you guys next time shit's
